zh.Crawfordjohn, Lanarkshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭藍納可爾可拉福爾越恩
zh.Draffan, Lanarkshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭藍納可爾德拉凡
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun於1220年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾盧度時，他的父親Hugh de Crawford30歲，母親Lady Alice de Draffen Heiress of Draffen19歲。他於1245年之前與Alicia de Dalsallock在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1263年登記服兵役。他去世於1297年在他的家鄉享年77歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾盧度。

zh-hans.Crawfordjohn, Lanarkshire, Scotland: 苏格兰藍納可爾可拉福爾越恩
zh-hans.Draffan, Lanarkshire, Scotland: 苏格兰藍納可爾德拉凡
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun于1220年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾盧度时，他的父亲Hugh de Crawford30岁，母亲Lady Alice de Draffen Heiress of Draffen19岁。他于1245年之前与Alicia de Dalsallock在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1263年登记服兵役。他去世于1297年在他的家乡享年77岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾斯爾盧度。

nameMeanings.name: Crawford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: habitational name from any of various places called Crawford, primarily the one in Lanarkshire (Scotland), and possibly also from the one in Lancashire. Both are named in Old English with crāwe ‘crow’ + ford ‘ford’.

variants.name: Crafford
meanings: English (Cumberland) and Scottish: variant of   Crawford  .

variants.name: Crofoot
meanings: English: variant ofCrowfoot, a nickname for someone with splayed feet or someother deformity of the foot, from Old English crāwe ‘crow’ +fōt ‘foot’. In Middle English crou-fot also denotedthe buttercup, and it may be from this sense that the name arose,although the reason for its adoption is unclear.

variants.name: Crofut
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of Crawford or Crowfoot (see Crofoot ).

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun was born in 1220, in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Hugh de Crawford, was 30 and his mother, Lady Alice de Draffen Heiress of Draffen, was 19. He married Alicia de Dalsallock before 1245, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1263. He died in 1297, in his hometown, at the age of 77, and was buried in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun est né en 1220, à Loudoun, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Hugh de Crawford, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice de Draffen Heiress of Draffen, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Alicia de Dalsallock avant 1245, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1263. Il est décédé en 1297, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Loudoun, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun 1220 in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Crawford 30 und seine Mutter Lady Alice de Draffen Heiress of Draffen 19. Er hat vor 1245 in Scotland Alicia de Dalsallock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1263 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1297 im Alter von 77 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun è nato il nel 1220 nel Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Hugh de Crawford, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Lady Alice de Draffen Heiress of Draffen, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Alicia de Dalsallock prima del 1245, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1263. Morì nel 1297, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudounが1220年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアロウドウンで生まれた時，父Hugh de Crawfordは30歳，母Lady Alice de Draffen Heiress of Draffenは19歳であった。1245年以前にスコットランドでAlicia de Dalsallockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1263年に兵役登録をした。彼は1297年に故郷で77歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアロウドウンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun(이)가 1220년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 루다운에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Crawford(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice de Draffen Heiress of Draffen(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1245년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Alicia de Dalsallock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1263년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1297년 그의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르 루다운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun nasceu em 1220, em Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Hugh de Crawford, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice de Draffen Heiress of Draffen, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Alicia de Dalsallock antes 1245, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1263. Ele faleceu em 1297, em sua cidade natal, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun родился в 1220 г. в местности лоудоун, аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Hugh de Crawford было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice de Draffen Heiress of Draffen, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Alicia de Dalsallock перед 1245 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. В 1263 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1297 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности лоудоун, аиршир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun nació en 1220, en Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Hugh de Crawford, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Lady Alice de Draffen Heiress of Draffen, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Alicia de Dalsallock antes de 1245, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1263. Murió en 1297, en su pueblo, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland.
